calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Hearing On Exparte Petition For Immediate Relief Per Cal. Prob. Code Sec. 10454 For Order Revoking Revising 2/28/07 Ruling. Ect.
Off Calendar May-08-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Peter Gianopoulos appearing by phone in pro per. Fred Campagnoli appearing for executor. Mr. Gianopoulos stated his case. Mr. Campagnoli responded. Mr. Gianopoulos stated his rebuttal. Ex parte petition to revoke order is denied. Mr. Gianopoulos has the right to contest the will but this is not the proper form. Mr. Campagnoli will prepare an order.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: F. Smith.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Hearing On Exparte Petition For Immediate Relief Per Cal. Prob. Code Sec. 10454 For Order Revoking Revising 2/28/07 Ruling. Ect.
Off Calendar Apr-24-2007 Continued To May-08-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Feb-28-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Fred Campagnoli appearing for petitioner/respondent Cecile Gianopoulos. Peter Gianopoulos appearing by phone. Competing petitions. Oral argument presented by both sides. Mr. Gianopoulos wants the Court to appoint an independent administrator. Court is admitting the Will to probate and appointing the named executor. N/B. Order signed. Mr. Gianopoulos still have the opportunity to contest the Will.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: J. Peralta.
